about.title: About
about.name: Yahari
about.description: I'm a middle school student who loves programming and technology. I'm mainly focused on web development and working on various projects. I enjoy learning new technologies and strive to grow every day.

bluearchive.title: BlueArchive Unofficial API
bluearchive.description: RESTful API providing Blue Archive game data. Access character info, stats, skill data and more.

discord.title: Discord Bot
discord.description: Multi-functional Discord Bot with moderation, music playback, custom commands and various features.

school.title: School SNS/LMS
school.description: Social network and learning management system for schools. Supports communication between students and teachers.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Yahari (hereinafter referred to as "this site") establishes the following privacy policy regarding the handling of user's personal information.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.description: This site may collect the following information:
items: Name, email address, and inquiry content provided through the contact form
Access analysis data by Google Analytics (anonymized IP address, browser information, pages viewed, etc.)

section2.title: 2. Use of Cookies
section2.description: This site uses cookies to improve user experience and for access analysis.
section2.gaDescription: This site uses Google Analytics, an access analysis tool by Google. Google Analytics uses cookies to collect data. This data is collected anonymously and does not identify individuals.
section2.gaDisable: You can refuse collection by disabling cookies in your browser settings. For more information, please see

section3.title: 3. Purpose of Information Use
section3.description: Collected information is used for the following purposes:

section4.title: 4. Disclosure to Third Parties
section4.description: This site will not provide personal information to third parties without user consent, except as required by law.

section5.title: 5. Security
section5.description: This site takes necessary and appropriate measures for the safe management of personal information, including prevention of leakage, loss, and damage.

section6.title: 6. Cloudflare Turnstile
section6.description: The contact form on this site uses Cloudflare Turnstile for spam prevention. This verifies that users are human. For more information, please see

section7.title: 7. Changes to Privacy Policy
section7.description: This site may change this privacy policy as necessary. The revised privacy policy shall take effect from the time it is posted on this site.

section8.title: 8. Contact
section8.description: For inquiries regarding this privacy policy, please contact us through the

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved. Please check the URL.

serverError.title: Something went wrong
serverError.description: Sorry, a temporary problem has occurred. Please try again in a few moments.

badRequest.title: Bad Request
badRequest.description: The server could not understand the request due to invalid syntax. Please check the URL and request content.

teapot.title: I'm a teapot
teapot.description: The server refuses to brew coffee because it is, permanently, a teapot.
teapot.rfc: RFC 2324 - Hyper Text Coffee Pot Control Protocol

designSystem.label: DESIGN SYSTEM
designSystem.title: Design System
designSystem.description: An overview of the design tokens and UI primitives that make up this site — colors, typography, spacing, and components, all in one place.

colors.title: Colors
colors.description: A grayscale-based palette that adapts between light and dark mode.

typography.title: Typography
typography.description: Fluid typography powered by clamp(), scaling smoothly with the viewport width.

spacing.title: Spacing
spacing.description: Section spacing tokens measured in vh, keeping a consistent rhythm relative to viewport height.

buttons.title: Buttons
buttons.description: Two systems: pill-shaped for primary actions, compact for secondary controls.

cards.title: Cards
cards.description: Opaque cards that lift on hover.

forms.title: Form Fields
forms.description: Minimal underline-only inputs that change color on focus.

badges.title: Badges & Status
badges.description: Small badges and indicators for status display.

sampleCard.title: Sample card
sampleCard.description: Lifts up and gains a shadow on hover.
